name: Apple Oatmeal Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together the dry ingredients: oats, bread flour, and yeast.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together the wet ingredients: applesauce, vegetable oil, honey, salt, and cinnamon.
4. Pour the wet mixture into the dry mixture and stir until just combined.
5. Fold in the diced dried apples.
6. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan and spread evenly.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack before slicing.
